chunks.text: ORDER SHEET I N T HE HI G H CO U R T O F S I N DH B E N C H AT S U K K U R C. P No. D – 1433 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.5739/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 02-10-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Kashif Hussain Memon, Assistant Education Officer (P) Ghotki at Mirpur Mathelo >>>>>><<<<<<< Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that as per instructions the Petitioner has taken away his file from him, therefore, he is no more advocate for the petitioner, hence, his name may be deleted from the cause list as well as case file. Order accordingly. Learned Additional AG places on record copy of order dated 01-11-2022 passed in C.P No.D-971 of 2021. Since none has appeared to proceed with this matter on behalf of the Petitioner. The instant matter is pending on the file of this Court without any useful progress. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioner prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or he has lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
